description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building the project on different platforms and compilers, including Linux (GCC, GCC 5, Clang), Windows (MSVC 32-bit, MSVC 64-bit, MinGW, BCC32), and macOS (Clang). Each job should check out the code, install dependencies, configure CMake, and build the project.
